title: Post-Shearing 1x SMRTbell Bead Cleanup (Manual Version)
author: Jae Hee Jang
materials: Recommended: Evaluate sample quality (concentration and size distribution)

steps.title: Add SMRTbell cleanup beads
steps.instruction: Add 1.0x v/v (volume over volume) of resuspended, room-temperature SMRTbell cleanup beads to each tube of sheared DNA.

steps.title: Mix beads and DNA
steps.instruction: Pipette-mix using wide-bore pipette tips until the beads are evenly distributed. Alternatively, the tubes may be gently flicked to mix.

steps.title: Quick-spin tube strip
steps.instruction: Quick-spin the tube strip in a microcentrifuge to collect liquid.

steps.title: Incubate for DNA binding
steps.instruction: Leave at room temperature for 00:10:00 to allow DNA to bind beads.

steps.title: Separate beads magnetically
steps.instruction: Place the tube strip in a magnetic separation rack until beads separate fully from the solution.

steps.title: Remove supernatant
steps.instruction: Slowly pipette off the cleared supernatant without disturbing the beads. Discard the supernatant.

steps.title: Wash with 80% ethanol (1st wash)
steps.instruction: Slowly dispense 200 µL , or enough to cover the beads, of freshly prepared 80% ethanol into each tube. Wait 00:00:30 , then pipette off the 80% ethanol and discard.

steps.title: Remove residual ethanol
steps.instruction: Remove residual 80% ethanol: Remove the tube strip from the magnetic separation rack. Quick-spin the tube strip in a microcentrifuge. Place the tube strip back in a magnetic separation rack until beads separate fully from the solution. Pipette off residual 80% ethanol and discard.

steps.title: Elute DNA with low TE buffer
steps.instruction: Remove the tube strip from the magnetic rack. Immediately add 48.5 µL of low TE buffer to each tube and resuspend the beads by pipetting 10 times or until evenly distributed. Use wide-bore pipette tips when mixing. Alternatively, the tubes may be gently flicked to mix.

steps.title: Quick-spin tube strip
steps.instruction: Quick-spin the tube strip in a microcentrifuge to collect liquid.

steps.title: Incubate for DNA elution
steps.instruction: Leave at Room temperature for 00:05:00 to elute DNA.

steps.title: Separate beads magnetically
steps.instruction: Place the tube strip in a magnetic separation rack until beads separate fully from the solution.

steps.title: Transfer eluted DNA
steps.instruction: Slowly pipette off 47 µL cleared supernatant without disturbing the beads. Transfer supernatant to a new tube strip. Discard old tube strip with beads.

steps.title: Bring SMRTbell beads to Room temperature
steps.instruction: Bring SMRTbell cleanup beads to Room temperature for at least 00:20:00 before proceeding

steps.title: Resuspend SMRTbell cleanup beads
steps.instruction: Resuspend SMRTbell cleanup beads by vortexing thoroughly

steps.title: Dilute sample for measurement
steps.instruction: Take 1 µL from each sample tube and dilute with 9 µL elution buffer or water

steps.title: Measure DNA concentration (Qubit)
steps.instruction: Measure DNA concentration of the 1:10 dilution using the Qubit 1x dsDNA High Sensitivity kit

steps.title: Measure DNA size distribution (Agilent Femto Pulse)
steps.instruction: Measure DNA size distribution of the 1:10 dilution using the Agilent 165 kb Genomic DNA kit on Femto Pulse
